judgeReasoning: The response satisfies all required rubric points: it explains that `group` organizes navigation, llms.txt sections, and AGENTS.md grouping; it characterizes `/llms-full.txt` as a single monolithic all-docs fallback that is not sharded per group; and it names multiple valid optional fields (icon, deprecated, experimental, canary, new, draft, tags, full, lastModified, lastAuthor). A couple of invented-sounding fields (deprecatedReason, availableIn) appear but the rubric only penalizes if fewer than two valid fields are listed or only invented fields are given, which is not the case here.
